name: Coil 🐺 Phighting
description:
💛

Make your own story/Open prompt!

I’ll admit it, I caved and made the final bot today. I just didn’t feel like prolonging the process anymore.

But it’s finally over! Don’t abandon this account of mine just yet though, because I might continue the series with non playable characters soon. And I may also import some of my old bots to this account if anyone’s interested.

I also added some more information in the desc since my og desc was written on the day that Coil was revealed.

🩵
creator: Hatchet2Habit
